key_risks: Sticky inflation readings on June 10 CPI could pressure growth equities
FOMC decision on June 17 may introduce volatility if policy signals shift
Overconcentration in high-valuation tech amplifies downside from any risk-off rotation

portfolio.rationale: Strong recent momentum and ISM manufacturing expansion support tech sector outperformance into July.
Elevated trailing returns and AI infrastructure demand position semiconductors for continued gains over the scoring window.
High recent performance and sustained enterprise spending on security provide near-term catalyst support.

portfolio_rationale: Concentrated allocation to high-momentum technology and AI-related sectors leverages positive ISM data and recent price strength for the one-month horizon.
rationale_summary: Tech, semiconductors, and cybersecurity selected for superior trailing performance and alignment with expansionary manufacturing indicators ahead of June data releases.
